nasb.text: from the blood of Abel to the blood of Zechariah, who was killed between the altar and the house of God; yes, I tell you, it shall be charged against this generation.’

esv.text: from the blood of Abel to the blood of Zechariah, who perished between the altar and the sanctuary. Yes, I tell you, it will be required of this generation.

csbs.text: 就是从亚伯的血起，直到在祭坛和圣所之间被杀的撒迦利亚的血为止。 “是的，我告诉你们：这世代将要为此被追讨。
